extensionDescription.message: Farm Twitch and Kick drops through normal browser sessions, visible muted tabs, and optional low-resource mode.

promoTagline.message: Farm Twitch & Kick drops on autopilot.

settingsLanguageDescription.message: Choose the language used by the popup and extension notifications.

watchingPausedHint.message: Watching paused. Toggle to resume drop farming.

priorityHint.message: Drops always take priority over the Watch Queue. Drag campaigns by the grip to set farming order.

noActivity.message: No activity recorded yet. Press refresh to run a check.

pauseManualDescription.message: Stop farming while you have a stream open and are watching yourself.

autoStartDescription.message: Begin farming as soon as the extension loads.

rewardEarnedDescription.message: Notify when a drop reward is claimable.

noDropsLeftDescription.message: Notify when all active campaigns are exhausted.

autoClaimDescription.message: Claim earned drop rewards automatically when they become available.

campaignPriorityDescription.message: How campaigns are chosen to farm. Priority list only farms just the campaigns you've manually reordered; the others pick among all campaigns. Limit which categories are farmed per platform under Platform settings.

watchQueueFallbackOnlyTitle.message: Only when no drops are active

platformSettingsDescription.message: Automation and channels for one provider. Switch between Twitch and Kick.

farmingTabsDescription.message: Controls for video-tab farming. Tab-specific controls are disabled while tabless low-resource mode is enabled.

tablessDescription.message: Farm via lightweight watch signals instead of a video tab. Twitch uses watch heartbeats; Kick uses a viewer connection. Falls back to a tab automatically if it stops earning.

autoCloseTabsDescription.message: Automatically close when the extension is idle (no drops to farm or no streamers to watch).

muteTabsDescription.message: Keep drop and Watch Queue tabs muted while farming.

keepVideosUnmutedDescription.message: Keeps page video players unmuted while the browser tab is muted.

tablessDisabledReason.message: Disabled while tabless low-resource mode is enabled.

adFocusDescription.message: Ad countdowns freeze in background tabs. Briefly focus the farming tab while an ad plays so it counts down, then restore your previous tab.

advancedDescription.message: Only change these if you know what you are doing — they control low-level scheduler and logging behavior.

schedulerIntervalDescription.message: How often campaign and streamer status refreshes.

farmOnPlatform.message: Farm drops and watch the queue on $1.

watchQueueEditHint.message: Edit it from the Watch Queue tab after selecting $1.

excludedChannelsDescription.message: Campaign farming will skip these streamers.

farmAllCategoriesDescription.message: Farm drops in every $1 category. Turn off to farm only a chosen set.

noCategoriesSelected.message: No categories selected — nothing will be farmed on $1. Add categories below.

activityLogLevelsDescription.message: Choose which levels are recorded in the Activity log. Errors are always kept.

visibleCampaignsDescription.message: Choose which campaign states show in the Drops list. A campaign with a claimable reward always stays visible.

forgetExcludedDescription.message: Clear every campaign you excluded from farming.

notificationNoDropsLeftMessage.message: $1 has no eligible drops to farm.

screenshotTwitchHeadline.message: Twitch and Kick drops, managed from one popup.

screenshotTwitchSubcopy.message: Lurkloot farms eligible campaigns through your normal browser session with visible muted tabs.

screenshotKickSubcopy.message: The same automation, eligibility checks, and auto-claim you rely on for Twitch — now covering Kick creator rewards.

screenshotQueueHeadline.message: A fallback Watch Queue keeps you earning.

screenshotQueueSubcopy.message: When no drops are active, Lurkloot watches your favorite channels so your time online never goes to waste.

screenshotSettingsHeadline.message: Tune every detail to your setup.

screenshotSettingsSubcopy.message: Per-platform automation, auto-claim, muted tabs, game priority, and an experimental low-resource tabless mode.

screenshotActivitySubcopy.message: A transparent activity log shows every check, switch, and claim — filterable by level so nothing happens behind your back.
